'''gathazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fcp|fcp]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fcp|fcp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gathazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæthæzhæth|gæthæzhæth]] || [[word:gæthæzhæj|gæthæzhæj]] || [[word:gæthæzhæsh|gæthæzhæsh]] || [[word:gæthæzhæ|gæthæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gathathazhath|gathathazhath]] || [[word:gathathazhaj|gathathazhaj]] || [[word:gathathazhash|gathathazhash]] || [[word:gathathazha|gathathazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gathazhath|gathazhath]] || [[word:gathazhaj|gathazhaj]] || [[word:gathazhash|gathazhash]] || [[word:gathazha|gathazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gathafzhath|gathafzhath]] || [[word:gathafzhaj|gathafzhaj]] || [[word:gathafzhash|gathafzhash]] || [[word:gathafzhaf|gathafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gathazhatha|gathazhatha]] || [[word:gathazhaja|gathazhaja]] || [[word:gathazhasha|gathazhasha]] || [[word:gathazhaka|gathazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gathazhath|gathazhath]] || [[word:gathazhaj|gathazhaj]] || [[word:gathazhash|gathazhash]] || [[word:gathazha|gathazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gathazhathal|gathazhathal]] || [[word:gathazhajal|gathazhajal]] || [[word:gathazhashal|gathazhashal]] || [[word:gathazhakal|gathazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gathazhathatha|gathazhathatha]] || [[word:gathazhajaja|gathazhajaja]] || [[word:gathazhashasha|gathazhashasha]] || [[word:gathazhaka|gathazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gathazhathan|gathazhathan]] || [[word:gathazhajan|gathazhajan]] || [[word:gathazhashan|gathazhashan]] || [[word:gathazhakan|gathazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gathazhathaoro|gathazhathaoro]] || [[word:gathazhajaoro|gathazhajaoro]] || [[word:gathazhashaoro|gathazhashaoro]] || [[word:gathazhakaoro|gathazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
